evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate an image provider comparison report.
assertions: JSON report contains full price, speed, automatedQuality, and humanQuality arrays for local and service groups
price and speed surfaces include every provider in the group, with missing values last as n/a
automatedQuality uses image judge qualityScore when present
humanQuality is unavailable without explicit humanQualityScore
fastest, cheapest, and highestQuality compatibility aliases point at full arrays
markdown has separate local and service Price, Speed, Automated Quality, and Human Quality sections without Top 3 labels

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate a music provider comparison report.
assertions: JSON report contains full price, speed, automatedQuality, and humanQuality arrays for local and service groups
price and speed surfaces include every provider in the group, with missing values last as n/a
automatedQuality is unavailable without explicit qualityScore
humanQuality is unavailable without explicit humanQualityScore
markdown does not include Top 3, Overall Ranking, Tier Breakdown, or combined Ranking sections

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate OCR provider comparison reports from the fixture run.
assertions: provider-comparison-report.md has a Metric Rankings section with Local and Third-Party Service groups
provider-comparison-report.md does not have Overall Ranking, Tier Breakdown, combined Ranking, or Top 3 sections
provider-comparison-report.json contains metricRankings.local.price, speed, and qualityScore arrays
provider-comparison-report.json contains metricRankings.thirdPartyService.price, speed, and qualityScore arrays
provider-comparison-report.json omits rankingSurfaces, overall, overallMetric, overallWeights, and tiering
OCR qualityScore rankings use score, WER, and CER evidence
local price rankings use zero monetary cost and service rankings keep missing price entries last

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate STT provider comparison reports from the fixture run.
assertions: reference-comparison-report.md has a Metric Rankings section with Local, Third-Party Service Non-Diarization, and Third-Party Service Diarization groups
reference-comparison-report.md does not have Overall Ranking, Tier Breakdown, combined Ranking, or Top 3 sections
reference-comparison-report.json contains metricRankings.local.price, speed, and qualityScore arrays
reference-comparison-report.json contains metricRankings.thirdPartyServiceNonDiarization.price, speed, and qualityScore arrays
reference-comparison-report.json contains metricRankings.thirdPartyServiceDiarization.price, speed, and qualityScore arrays
reference-comparison-report.json omits rankingSurfaces, overall, overallMetric, overallWeights, and tiering
STT qualityScore rankings use score, speaker-aware WER, text-only WER, and diarization evidence
local price rankings use zero monetary cost and service rankings keep missing price entries last

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate TTS provider comparison reports with existing roundtrip transcripts.
assertions: TTS JSON contains complete local and service price, speed, automatedQuality, and humanQuality arrays
TTS automatedQuality rankings use roundtrip WER-derived accuracy, including voice-quality-report median WER when present
TTS humanQuality rankings use humanSpeechScore from voice-quality-report.json
TTS fastest, cheapest, and highestQuality compatibility aliases are preserved
TTS markdown does not label ranking sections as Top 3
duration and file size are not used as quality proxies

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate URL provider comparison reports from the fixture run.
assertions: provider-comparison-report.md has separate Local Providers and Service Providers sections with Price, Speed, Automated Quality, and Human Quality tables
provider-comparison-report.md does not have Top 3, Overall Ranking, Tier Breakdown, or combined Ranking sections
provider-comparison-report.json contains full price, speed, automatedQuality, and humanQuality arrays plus compatibility aliases
price and speed surfaces include every provider in the group, with missing values last as n/a
URL automatedQuality rankings use WER/CER/coverage-derived accuracy evidence
URL normalized JSON omits overall, overallMetric, overallWeights, and tiering

evals.prompt: Use the consensus skill to generate a video provider comparison report.
assertions: JSON report contains full price, speed, automatedQuality, and humanQuality arrays for local and service groups
price and speed surfaces include every provider in the group, with missing values last as n/a
automatedQuality is unavailable without explicit qualityScore
humanQuality is unavailable without explicit humanQualityScore
markdown does not include Top 3, Overall Ranking, Tier Breakdown, or combined Ranking sections
